name: notify
description: Send a notification to the user via the scratch TUI. Use this to communicate progress, status, warnings, or errors while you're doing other work. The user sees the notification in real time; the tool's response confirms delivery.

level.description: Severity level. Use 'info' for status updates and progress, 'warning' for non-fatal issues the user should know about, 'error' for serious problems that may need attention.

message.description: The notification message to display to the user.
